response.justification: Maria has extensive software development experience (15+ years) and strong leadership in technical roles, including team coordination and code reviews. However, her experience in developer tools (e.g., compilers, build systems) is limited to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, which may not fully align with the role's focus on mobile-platform tooling. Her mobile experience is present but not deep, and her people management experience is mostly in senior technical roles rather than dedicated management.
strengths: Strong technical leadership and hands-on coding across diverse stacks (TypeScript, D, C++, Node.js)
Proven track record in building developer tools and test automation frameworks
Extensive experience in system design, code review, and quality assurance
concerns: Limited direct experience with mobile-platform specific tools (e.g., iOS/Android build systems)
People management experience is primarily in senior technical roles rather than dedicated management
No clear evidence of leading organizational change or strategic roadmap planning at scale
